title: Enough Mods 2
body:
# A lightweight adventure-based modpack that doesn't feel clunky!
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61cb926e4db07afae89d6c1831297bc351bfcb28.png)

**Some features:**

- Souls-like combat system
- Easy multiplayer via e4mc (open to internet)
- Many new structures from mods such as YUNG's Better Desert Temple or Dungeons and Taverns
- Minecraft Dungeon's Weapons and enchantments
- Villagers can attack you if you steal from or hurt them!
- Performance improving mods like Sodium, Lithium or Entity Culling
- Many new mobs bosses and other enemys!
- A World that doesn't force you to progress through doing boring quests
- over 120 mods!
